1. AWS EC 2 
Elastic Compute Cloud  (EC2 ) is a virtual server for running applications on the  AWS  infrastructure.  It’s a virtual 
machine  running on AWS’s physical infrastructure  that provides resizable compute capacity . 
According to our needs, we can customize various a spects of it  such as:  
• OS (Amazon Linux, Microsoft Windows , Apple Mac ) 
• Instance Type  (general purpose, memory opti mized, compute optimized , storage optimized)  
• Purchasing Plans (On-Demand, Reserved, Savings, Sp ot, Dedicat ed Instances, D edicated Hosts)  
• Region/Availability Zone
